c.d: Reflects user satisfaction and app quality, influencing app store rankings and credibility.
Measures the speed at which the app gains new downloads, indicating popularity and relevance.
The variety and number of pre-designed templates available for creating collages.
The range of editing options such as filters, stickers, text options, and AI-powered enhancements.
How intuitive and easy the app is to use, especially for beginners.
The ability to customize layouts, backgrounds, and grid sizes.
Integration with social media platforms for easy sharing.
Inclusion of AI tools for tasks like background removal and smart template generation.
Availability of premium features and the cost of in-app purchases.
Effectiveness of keyword placement in app metadata (title, subtitle, keywords).
